CONVERT_ON_SAVE.NAME: Convert Markdown on each save
CONVERT_ON_SAVE.HINT: If enabled, upon saving a page in a journal, content is checked for markdown formatting and if recognized, it is converted automatically from Markdown to ProseMirror formatting.

NOTIFICATIONS.NO_EDITOR: Markdown conversion failed: editor is not available.
NOTIFICATIONS.NO_MARKDOWN: No Markdown formatting detected in the selected text.
NOTIFICATIONS.NO_CONVERTER: Markdown conversion is unavailable: Showdown converter not found.
NOTIFICATIONS.NO_PARSER: Convert Markdown could not access a ProseMirror HTML parser in this runtime.
NOTIFICATIONS.FAILED: Convert Markdown failed. Check console for details.
